topic: salt in food and wine tannin perception
trigger_keywords: sal en la percepción del vino al maridar con comida
suaviza los taninos y mejora el equilibrio

steps.label: cause
steps.text: Wine is tasted with food containing salt.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Salt can reduce the perceived bitterness and drying impact of the wine and shift attention toward fruit and body.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: Tannins may feel softer and the wine-food combination can appear more balanced.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: Tannins may feel softer and the wine-food combination can appear more balanced.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
